name: Lara Junior Cat Food 350g
description: The chunks are well balanced and contain all the necessary minerals and vitamins to make your kitten grow into a mature and healthy cat. The shape of the small chunks also ensures excellent ingestion. Lara Junior is a complete food for kittens until the age of 1. Weight 0.35 kg Product Size 350 gm Ingredients 0.2% Turine, 0.3 mgE8 (selenium), 1.2% Phosphore, 1.3% Calcium, 1.5% cellulose brute, 10 mg E4 (cuivre), 100 mg 3b605 (zinc), 12.0% teneur en matieres grasses, 150 mg Vitamin E, 1500 U.I. Vitamin D3, 2 mg 3b202 (iode), 30000 U.I. Vitamin A, 36.0% Protein, 75 mg E1(fer), 8.5% cendres brutes, 86 mg E5 (manganese), Antioxidants, Colorants Flavors Chicken, D
